summary: Plan-only remediation assessment over five open PR candidates plus hydrated first-hop refs. No GitHub mutations are recommended because comments/close are blocked by the job, no PR has complete merge preflight, and the prior planned fix_needed actions lacked a complete executable fix_artifact, so those repair recommendations are downgraded to non-mutating blocked needs_human decisions for the affected PRs.

The issue is plausibly covered by #93888, but the candidate is not ready for fixed-by-candidate closeout or merge.

#93876 appears to be the stronger sandbox repair path versus #93893, but the planned fix action is invalid without a complete executable fix_artifact and the security-linked context requires careful replanning before any executable repair path.
The issue is linked to a candidate docs PR, but closeout is blocked and the PR needs maintainer/review finalization.

Do not close or mutate because close is blocked and checks are pending; treat #93893 as an overlapping alternate currently superseded by the more complete #93876 path.
Maintainer judgment is needed on whether this boundary documentation is desired as written and whether the failed proof check is acceptable for a docs-only policy PR.
